ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the country (e.g., high, middle, low) */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "governance_type" TEXT /* Type of governance (e.g., democracy, monarchy) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the indicator belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the economic indicators are reported */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "exports" REAL /* Exports of the country */,
  "imports" REAL /* Imports of the country */,
  "income" REAL /* Average income of the country */,
  "inflation" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country */,
  "gdp_growth" REAL /* GDP growth rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  "debt_to_gdp" REAL /* Debt-to-GDP ratio */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the economic indicators were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the indicator belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the health indicators are reported */,
  "child_mortality" REAL /* Child mortality rate of the country */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy of the country */,
  "health_expenditure" REAL /* Health expenditure of the country */,
  "total_fertility" REAL /* Total fertility rate of the country */,
  "hiv_rate" REAL /* HIV infection rate */,
  "malaria_rate" REAL /* Malaria infection rate */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the health indicators were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used by the data source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data source is updated */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
